hotel_name: Khách sạn Dalat Roof (Dalat Roof Hotel)

reviews.title: No frills
reviews.text: It was very quiet, we were like the only ones staying, a bit tucked away in local lanes. No services of any kind at hotel, couple of lical coffee shops within walking distance, and a oz themed cafe/rest and pricey for the place. Room size was big and beautiful town view, just the holiday vibe aint there for us

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Amazing view

reviews.title: Good spacious room, good location.
reviews.text: Room B102 (family room for 4 pax) needs to have the water pipes fixed since the water flow is really, really weak, either for the toilet or shower which is concerning. Luckily, my family has rented another room so we can use the toilet there sometimes. Everything would be perfect if we have this fixed. Spacious nice room, near Dalat market (10 min driver if you have car or bike). Should improve about daily cleaning as well when the used cups were not replaced.
reviews.response:
Xin kính chào quý khách,
Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách hàng đã lựa chọn Dalat Roof Hotel làm điểm dừng chân trong chuyến du lịch Đà Lạt vừa qua.

Chúng tôi rất vinh hạnh khi biết rằng Quý khách hàng đã có kì nghỉ thật thoải mái khi lưu trú tại khách sạn, và đó cũng là động lực giúp chúng tôi phục vụ tốt hơn nữa trong thời gian tới.

Một lần nữa, chân thành cám ơn Quý khách hàng và hy vọng sẽ được chào đón Quý khách hàng quay trở lại Khách sạn trong thời gian gần nhất.

Mến chúc Quý khách hàng và gia đình thật nhiều sức khỏe!
Trân Trọng,

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I've stayed here before and I can say. house keepingis one of the best I've experienced. and I've experienced a lot

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The water was  cold the whole stay
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double or Twin Room with City View

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Location, accommodating and friendly staffs.
Nice friendly staff, comfortable bed, decent location.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Khách sạn mới, sạch sẽ, nhưng bị cái cách âm kém quá, tối chó ở đâu sủa ồn cả đêm không ngủ được. 

Nhân viên cũng lịch sự nhưng khá trầm tính.

Vị trí ghi cách trung tâm tầm 2km nhưng đi cũng khá xa. Đi xe cũng mất tầm 10’ do đường cũng khá nhỏ.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Hôtel tout neuf , grande chambre au dernier étage avec une superbe vue
Personnel très sympathique
Endroit très calme
reviews.negatives:
Absence de restaurant ,ne serait ce que pour le petit déjeuner mais il y a un café 100 m plus bas vraiment excellent que je recommande
Il faisait froid à Da lat et le vent se faisait sentir dans la chambre qu on a pas réussi à réchauffer, l'eau de la douche était juste chaude à mon goût.
Mais il faut reconnaitre que nous n'étions pas assez chaudement vêtus ce qui dans l'ensemble nous a malheureusement obligé de changer d'hôtel

reviews.title: Romantic Getaway with Great Value
reviews.text: Our room had a beautiful view of the mountain resort town.  It does feel like you are on the roof of Dalat when you open the curtains in the morning.  The bed was okay.  The noise insulation isn't the best but tolerable.  The air conditioning unit was wisely located on top of the entrance in the hall way passage so you don't have gold breezes blowing in your face when you sleep.  A nice lounger by the window allows you to take in the view.  A separate vanity with mirror away from the TV counter is a great convenience.  Lots of closet space and hangers.   Everything is in near new condition.  Hotel is just a short 40,000VND Grab car ride into the city center.  All in all, a great place to stay in Dalat for the money.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La chambre était très spacieuse, lumineuse et calme, offrant une ambiance chaleureuse et apaisante idéale pour profiter du climat frais de Đà Lạt. En réalité, c'était un appartement situé au dernier étage, avec une propreté irréprochable. Un excellent rapport qualité-prix pour un séjour confortable au cœur des montagnes brumeuses.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.text: The hotel is pretty new (as of April 2025). Decent space for parking in front. My room was spacious. It also has an amazing view to the mountains.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Sehr liebevolle und geschmackvolle Einrichtung des Hauses.
Wir wurden sehr freundlich empfangen. Gemütliches und modernes Hotel.

reviews.title: Stay for 3 nights.
reviews.text: The hotel lacks amenities such as not having glass shower rooms, so when showering, water splashes out and it feels a bit unclean. Secondly, there were no tissues at the vanity table, and the most unsatisfactory point was that the cleaning staff did not clean thoroughly; I noticed leftover items from previous guests. The biggest positive was the staff's enthusiastic service, and the room was also quiet, so I rate the hotel 3 stars.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Die außergewöhnliche Unterkunft mitten in der Natur, der herzliche Empfang, die Gastfreundschaft, die tollen Tips der Eigentümerin, die Liebe zum Detail bei der Einrichtung, einfach alles. Kurzum eine perfekte Unterkunft

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nice and clean room but its a bit small, overall, its great!
reviews.room_type: Junior Double Room, Balcony, Hill View

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
tolle Lage, freundliches Personal, gemütliche Zimmer
Im großen und ganzen eine tolle Unterkunft, super Lage und ein sehr freundliches Personal.

reviews.title: Great Stay in a Quiet Neighborhood – Comfortable, Clean, and Convenient
reviews.text:
This is a fairly new hotel located in a peaceful residential area of Dalat. It's a great choice for those who prefer a quieter environment, yet still want to be close to the city center. The location strikes a nice balance — away from the hustle and bustle, but with easy access to nearby restaurants and cafés, so dining is never an issue.

The room I stayed in was bright, clean, and filled with natural light. It was air-conditioned and came equipped with essentials like clean towels, bottled drinking water, and coffee & tea supplies. The bed was medium-firm and very comfortable, and the bathroom was spotless, well-lit, odor-free, and had good water pressure.

One of the highlights was the private balcony, which offered a beautiful view — a perfect spot to relax after a day out.

Overall, this hotel offers excellent value, comfort, and tranquility. I would definitely recommend it to travelers looking for a peaceful stay in Dalat.

reviews.title: Goed verblijf
reviews.positives: Goed geslapen in een rustig hotelletje.  Vriendelijke ontvangst.
reviews.negatives: Geen ontbijt en weinig alternatief in de nabije buurt. Misschien iets voorzien om de balkondeur open te houden. O ja, en vergeet je oordopjes niet voor eventueel hondengeblaf of hanengekraai.

reviews.title: The room is clean and fully equipped.
reviews.text: The room has a corner view of the city and a very beautiful sunrise. If lucky, in the morning you can just stand by the window and enjoy the clouds without needing to go cloud hunting far away.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 가성비가 좋아요

reviews.title: The hotel is clean and charming.
reviews.text: The room is beautiful, new, and clean, located on the front of NTS street. The bathroom has no curtain, so the light from the lamp shines onto the bed.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: 热水器，晚上要开很久才达到热水水平

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Phòng đẹp, sạch sẽ, vật dụng đầy đủ và mới. Nước mạnh và ấm. Đi ra trung tâm và các khu tiện ích, ăn uống khá gần, trong bán kính 2,5 km. Điểm trừ duy nhất là vấn đề âm thanh. Đêm đầu tiên có bão nên mình nghĩ tiếng rào rào, sột soạt là do mưa bão, qua đêm sau bão tan rồi vẫn nghe sột soạt chắc ở tầng trên vọng xuống (mình ở lầu 1).

reviews.title: This could have been the best trip to Da Lat, but turned into the worst.
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives:
This could have been the best trip to Da Lat, but turned into the worst. Thanks to the hotel and how they treat their guests. After flying halfway across the world, we arrived in Da Lat for 4 days, including the weekend, hoping to enjoy the peaceful mountain atmosphere and the views (which we had to pay extra for, but more on that later).

First, we checked in and discovered that all rooms with balconies (we specifically booked one because the view in the Booking photos was absolutely stunning) face the road and an auto repair shop with constant drilling and noise. We asked to change rooms, which the hotel graciously did — for an additional fee, of course. So first they deceive you with photos on Booking, then profit from your desperation. Fine, whatever. We changed rooms, and it seemed like finally we could enjoy the magnificent city views from above and some peace and quiet.

Yeah… except the hotel decided, without any warning, to start cladding the building, and absolutely insane jackhammer noise and building vibrations began at 8 AM and continued until 7 PM. We asked the reception to at least stop the noise on Saturday and… got “oh sorry sorry ok” followed by even MORE noise on Saturday 😀 So after flying halfway around the world to relax in the quiet mountains, we spent all 4 days listening to the beautiful song of drills and jackhammers along with the lovely chirping of construction workers. A completely ruined impression of the entire city, and we will never be back in Da Lat. So the hotel could have gotten 5 stars, but ended up with only one.

-----

Đây lẽ ra có thể là chuyến đi Đà Lạt tuyệt vời nhất, nhưng hóa ra lại là tệ nhất. Nhờ vào khách sạn và cách họ đối xử với khách. Sau khi bay nửa vòng trái đất, chúng tôi đến Đà Lạt 4 ngày, bao gồm cả cuối tuần, để tận hưởng sự yên bình của núi rừng và ngắm cảnh (mà tất nhiên phải trả thêm tiền, nhưng chuyện đó để sau).

reviews.title: Room evaluation
reviews.text: I went with two couples to two separate rooms, and everyone was satisfied with the service as well as the room here. I like the design of the wardrobe in the room which has many compartments for easy organization of belongings. The location is also quite close to the center, making it convenient to move around. I might come back in the future.
reviews.response: Xin kính chào quý khách, Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách hàng đã lựa chọn Dalat Roof Hotel làm điểm dừng chân trong chuyến du lịch Đà Lạt vừa qua. Một lần nữa, chân thành cám ơn Quý khách hàng và hy vọng sẽ được chào đón Quý khách hàng quay trở lại Khách sạn trong thời gian gần nhất. Mến chúc Quý khách hàng và gia đình thật nhiều sức khỏe! Trân Trọng

reviews.title: Vui
reviews.positives: Khách sạn sạch sẽ
reviews.negatives: Đường vào nhỏ, xa trung tâm, khu vực để xe ô tô nhỏ, được tầm 4 chiếc trước sân khách sạn. Nếu đi chơi về trễ thì k còn chổ đậu

reviews.title: Review May 29, 2026
reviews.text: The new hotel is clean, and the staff is polite. It's close to the center, making it convenient to get around. There are also many famous dining spots nearby. I will definitely come back.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ, đủ tiên nghi. Nhân viên nhiệt tình, thân thiện
reviews.negatives: Hơi xa trung tâm, nhưng cũng không xa lắm

reviews.title: Newly built, clean with a great staff.
reviews.text: This newly built hotel offers breathtaking rooftop views of both the mountains and the city. Crisp white linens and cool air conditioning ensure a comfortable stay, while the staff—from the manager to the front desk and housekeeping—deliver exceptional service. It has quickly become my go-to hotel in Dalat.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Sạch, ngăn nắp

reviews.title: Khách sạn mới, rất tốt, nhân viên thân thiện!
reviews.text: Mọi trải nghiệm đều rất tuyệt vời, chỉ một điều duy nhất ở 2 cái tủ  đầu giường: một cái hộc  tủ là cái quần short thủng đáy chắc của khách trước để lại, một cái hộc tủ bên còn lại là 2 cây ráy tai đã dùng vàng khè mà không được dọn dẹp. Mình vẫn đánh giá rất cao khách sạn nhưng mong khách sạn hoàn thiện  hơn khâu vệ sinh phòng để mọi thứ luôn tuyệt vời!

reviews.title: Đáng để lưu trú
reviews.positives: Khách sạn ở vị trí nhìn toàn cảnh Đà Lạt rất đẹp. Trang thiết bị khách sạn rất mới và sạch sẽ.
reviews.negatives: Đèn phòng hơi thiếu sáng một chút.

reviews.title: Great experience here.
reviews.text: This accommodation provides a good night's sleep with spacious and clean rooms, and the male receptionist is very friendly, offering attentive service. However, the amenities could be improved further by adding a larger shaded parking area and a dining area for guests to enhance the experience. Nevertheless, this is still a great choice for those seeking comfort and convenience during their trip.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: view đẹp, có máy điều hoà
reviews.negatives: decor chưa thống nhất lắm, tuy nhiên với giá như vậy thì đã là tuyệt rồi.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is new, so everything is fresh. The space is airy and clean, especially not damp like other homestays or hotels. The staff is super cute, very attentive, and takes care of guests enthusiastically.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách, 
Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn quý khách đã lựa chọn Khách sạn Dalat Roof làm nơi lưu trú trong chuyến đi Đà Lạt vừa qua. Chúng tôi rất vinh dự khi biết rằng quý khách đã có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và thú vị tại khách sạn của chúng tôi. Sự hài lòng của quý khách là động lực lớn giúp chúng tôi tiếp tục nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ trong tương lai. Một lần nữa, xin chân thành cảm ơn, và chúng tôi mong được đón tiếp quý khách trở lại khách sạn trong thời gian tới.
 Chúc quý khách và gia đình luôn mạnh khỏe và hạnh phúc!
 Trân trọng,

reviews.title: Mọi thứ đều tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Không gian yên tĩnh. Phòng đầy đủ tiện nghi và trang trí đẹp, nhân viên thân thiện tôi rất hài lòng với kỳ nghỉ tại đây.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Recommend it!!

reviews.title: Thuận tiện đi lại
reviews.positives: Phòng rất tốt trong tầm giá. Cô chú quản lý khách sạn rất thân thiện và phục vụ nhiệt tình.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: We had the mountain mountain view room with balcony. Absolutely stunning views an beautiful sunsets! Staff were lovely and helpful. Rooms clean. Can’t fault it

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Красивый вид на город, красивый номер, панорамные окна.

reviews.title: A very nice new hotel with air conditioning
reviews.text: I had a great stay at this hotel! The staff were super friendly and professional, always happy to help. The towels were really nice and soft, and the white bedding made the room feel extra clean and fresh. Speaking of clean, the whole place was spotless. It’s a pretty new hotel, and you can tell — everything feels modern and well taken care of. They also have motorcycle rentals right there, which made getting around really easy. The view from the hotel is beautiful and added a nice touch to the stay. I’d definitely recommend this place if you’re visiting the area!

reviews.title: Отель очень классный. Идеальное соотношение цены и качества. Шикарный вид из окна
reviews.positives: Очень тёплый номер, есть подогрев от кондиционера. Удобная кровать, одеяла и подушки.

reviews.title: A very nice new hotel with air conditioning
reviews.text:
I had a great stay at this hotel! The staff were super friendly and professional, always happy to help. The towels were really nice and soft, and the white bedding made the room feel extra clean and fresh. Speaking of clean, the whole place was spotless.

It’s a pretty new hotel, and you can tell — everything feels modern and well taken care of. They also have motorcycle rentals right there, which made getting around really easy.

The view from the hotel is beautiful and added a nice touch to the stay. I’d definitely recommend this place if you’re visiting the area!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ładny i czysty pokój hotelowy. Zdecydowany plus to klimatyzacja, która pomaga w pozbyciu się wilgoci w deszczowe dni. Nie ma się do czego przyczepić:).

reviews.title: Ideal accommodation in Da Lat
reviews.text: The room is clean, well-equipped, the staff are friendly, the view is not very good but that's okay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: God beliggenhed , gode senge , venligt personale god pris

reviews.title: A room worth choosing.
reviews.text: The room is very good, new, clean, and the staff are enthusiastic and nice. I stayed in room 302 for 4 days and everything was fine, except for one thing: the toilet seemed to have a characteristic odor of toilets, but it was not significant. After 4 days, I added room 401. It was bigger and had a better view (a panoramic view of the city that looks great). Overall, there's nothing to criticize. Additionally, they change towels and tidy the beds every day. 10/10.

reviews.title: Not recommended!
reviews.positives: The room was very tidy and the location is quiet, but that’s all
reviews.negatives: We paid for a room with a view on the mountains - on the picture you see what we got, paid for nothing. Both rooms had no nice view that was expected. The personnel is slow and heavy to understand: we booked two rooms for three persons, they kept asking for the fourth person to stay with us. Water pressure in the shower is very low and you get cold, as air conditioning may not be turned off in the bathroom. We were asked to pay extra for the dirty towels. We moved to another hotel for the next night.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The new hotel is clean and fully equipped, but the rooms are not soundproof, so you can hear some noise. However, overall the hotel is very good and worth the price.

reviews.title: Cool weather, comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Room looks quite new and clean, and rather spacious. Comfortable bed. Wi-Fi and smart TV works well. More than enough electric sockets. Steaming hot water for shower. Nice to have a balcony. Like to spend time at its rooftop, the view is great. Reception staff are quite friendly. There's some cafes and restaurants along the road, so it's no that isolated. Very reasonable room rate.
reviews.negatives: As the room faces the road, traffic noise especially the horning sound would be really loud, because some section of the windows on top are kept wide opened.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel is beautiful, super clean, and feels brand new. It has incredible views and an excellent location. The breakfast buffet was delicious, and the staff was amazing. They even upgraded our room at no extra cost, completely unexpectedly, which was a huge plus.

Overall, an excellent stay.

reviews.title: Beautiful room with a beautiful view.
reviews.text: The hotel is close to the center, convenient for going to a few nearby places, and the rented motorbike is new as well. The reception staff are enthusiastic and friendly.

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Is a relaxing hotel. Quiet clean and nice view.

reviews.title: Very nice view
reviews.text: Good hotel,worth it's money. Very nice view, clean and comfortable room. Friendly stuff

reviews.title: Best view
reviews.text: The hotel has superb view and few eateries nearby. The staff speak good English and very helpful. Clean and beautiful hotel. Easy to get grab to city centre.

reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.text: The room is clean, the staff is friendly, the prices are reasonable, and the hotel is also close to the center - about 2.5 km from Da Lat market.

reviews.title: Love
reviews.text: Love the hotel, the staff also very good

reviews.title: The hotel is clean and comfortable.
reviews.text: The mountain view room is quite beautiful, spacious with 2 single beds comfortable for 2 adults and 1 child. The room is clean, fully equipped, with reversible air conditioning. It is about 2 km from the center, the road is not difficult but quite steep. The only downside is that it is close to the road, so it can be quite noisy at night and early in the morning; soundproofing is not very good. The staff are friendly, provide good assistance to guests, lend umbrellas, and sell raincoats.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Đầy đủ tiện nghi. Sạch sẽ. Các staff thân thiện, hỗ trợ nhiệt tình.

reviews.title: Xứng đáng quay lại
reviews.text: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, phòng sạch sẽ, view tuyệt đẹp

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great place to stay. The room is comfortable and have big space. The bathroom is big enough for couple. The room also have A/C that is awesome for hot season. Friendly staff and always clean the room on time.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean and cozy. I like the way it's arranged and the interior design. Overall, I'm pleased.

reviews.title: Wonderful experience
reviews.text: The hotel is very new. The staff is friendly and very supportive. I give them five stars. I will come back.

reviews.title: clean, convenient, enthusiastic staff
reviews.text: With a price of 500k/night, I highly recommend everyone stay at this hotel; everything is great. It's about 2.5km from the center, and we rented a motorbike, so it was very convenient for getting around.

reviews.title: Service
reviews.text:
Great service, receptionist was very kind and nice. So grateful.  5* all-around.
 NguyenHong.

reviews.title: Best recommendation
reviews.text: I would love to stay here and will visit once time again with my whole family later soon.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel matches the pictures, is convenient, clean, and the staff are warm and friendly. The downside is that the soundproofing in the room isn't very good; you can still hear noise from room # when someone is talking loudly. The price is cheap for those who prefer to stay in the center, with a travel time of 8-10 minutes and a spacious room with a clear view.

reviews.title: Dalat roof hotel
reviews.text: The newly built hotel in 2024 is clean and equipped with amenities, conveniently located for transportation, with enthusiastic and friendly staff, and has a reasonable size suitable for the price.

reviews.title: Clean but quite small room.
reviews.text:
The rooms looked good, clean, had good hot water system, enventhough it is a bit small for the price and the view was worth for having some fresh air only, not for sightseeing. Noise-proof did not actually work btw.


Staffs were enthusiam and feedback quickly

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.text: From my experience, the 3 nights at the hotel were truly wonderful. The hotel has the advantage of being in a high location, offering a view of the entire city. The staff are super friendly, and the amenities are very suitable for the price. 100% recommend. Thank you very much to the hotel.
reviews.response: Xin kính chào quý khách, Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách hàng đã lựa chọn Dalat Roof Hotel làm điểm dừng chân trong chuyến du lịch Đà Lạt vừa qua. Chúng tôi rất vinh hạnh khi biết rằng Quý khách hàng đã có kì nghỉ thật thoải mái khi lưu trú tại khách sạn, và đó cũng là động lực giúp chúng tôi phục vụ tốt hơn nữa trong thời gian tới. Một lần nữa, chân thành cám ơn Quý khách hàng và hy vọng sẽ được chào đón Quý khách hàng quay trở lại Khách sạn trong thời gian gần nhất. Mến chúc Quý khách hàng và gia đình thật nhiều sức khỏe! Trân Trọng

The reception staff are extremely polite, enthusiastic, and lovely.

reviews.title: 眺め最高
reviews.text: シティビューの部屋からの眺めがとても良かったです！

reviews.title: 전망이 좋은 호텔
reviews.text: 위치상으로 다소 아쉬운부분이 있지만 숙소에서 보는 전경과 야경은 너무 좋았어요. 그리고 조용한 숙소입니다.

reviews.title: CÂN NHẮC
reviews.text: Mình có ở ksan 2 đêm 14-16/5, có để quên 1 bộ đồ treo trong tủ quần áo(kèm đồ lót). Gọi nhờ check dùm thì báo lại chỉ có đồ lót nên dọn phòng bỏ thùng rác luôn. Mình khẳng định 100% là có bộ đồ, chứ chẳng ai rãnh mà treo mỗi đồ lót trong tủ. Mình có nhờ lễ tân check cam lại thì lễ tân tl liền luôn là phòng mình bị khuất cam. Cũng may là để quên quần áo thôi chứ đồ có giá trị là cũng….Thấy ksan mới phòng ok, cũng tính tháng sau quay lại nhưng sau vụ này thì bye luôn ko hẹn gặp lại

reviews.title: Nhân viên k nhiệt tình
reviews.text:
Đặt phòng giường lớn agoda gửi về phòng 2 giường.
Nhờ nhân viên check đổi phòng qua giường lớn nhưng nhân viên bắt đổi phòng thêm hơn 200k mặc dù check giá trên app 2 phòng bằng giá nhau
reviews.response:
Xin kính chào quý khách,
Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách hàng đã lựa chọn Dalat Roof Hotel làm điểm dừng chân trong chuyến du lịch Đà Lạt vừa qua.

reviews.title: Nhân viên chưa chuyên nghiệp
reviews.text: Gia đình mình tới ks lúc 20h vali túi xách đùm đề mà bạn nhân viên lễ tân ko hỗ trợ. Cảm giác ko được chào đón, tất cả hành lý mình tự vát hết.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Phòng mới sạch sẽ, nội thất đẹp. Nhưng nhân viên hơi thiếu chuyên nghiệp khi hỗ trợ khách hàng gây sự khó chịu. Giờ checkout là 12h, nhưng nhân viên yêu cầu tôi trả sớm hơn trước 12h.  Nếu có khách sau vào ở cũng vào lúc 14h nhưng tôi không hiểu tại sao được yêu cầu như vậy.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Sạch sẽ
reviews.response: Kính gửi Quý khách, Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn quý khách đã lựa chọn Khách sạn Dalat Roof làm nơi lưu trú trong chuyến đi Đà Lạt vừa qua. Chúng tôi rất vinh dự khi biết rằng quý khách đã có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và thú vị tại khách sạn của chúng tôi. Sự hài lòng của quý khách là động lực lớn giúp chúng tôi tiếp tục nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ trong tương lai. Một lần nữa, xin chân thành cảm ơn, và chúng tôi mong được đón tiếp quý khách trở lại khách sạn trong thời gian tới. Chúc quý khách và gia đình luôn mạnh khỏe và hạnh phúc! Trân trọng,

reviews.title: Tốt, ở 2 lần rồi.
reviews.text: Đã ở 2 lần.
reviews.response: Kính gửi Quý khách, Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn quý khách đã lựa chọn Khách sạn Dalat Roof làm nơi lưu trú trong chuyến đi Đà Lạt vừa qua. Chúng tôi rất vinh dự khi biết rằng quý khách đã có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và thú vị tại khách sạn của chúng tôi. Sự hài lòng của quý khách là động lực lớn giúp chúng tôi tiếp tục nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ trong tương lai. Một lần nữa, xin chân thành cảm ơn, và chúng tôi mong được đón tiếp quý khách trở lại khách sạn trong thời gian tới. Chúc quý khách và gia đình luôn mạnh khỏe và hạnh phúc! Trân trọng,

reviews.title: 很棒的住宿
reviews.text: 房間寬敞乾淨，早上可看雲海，晚上可看夜景，絕佳的景觀👍，只是建議腳踏墊要每次更換乾淨的，房間地板都乾淨無比，可光腳走，但踩到髒的腳踏墊，整個就覺得很不舒服了！這樣就很可惜了！
